page.title: File:弥山 (広島県) 対岸から.JPG

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:File:弥山_(広島県)_対岸から.JPG]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: imorting all shinto cults 厳島神社 (広島県)

+[[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, adding jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too.]][[ja:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]]
